findings: Full compliance with Companies Act requirements. Board composition meets independence requirements. Audit, Risk, and Remuneration committees fully constituted.
Annual financial statements submitted to Ministry of Finance within statutory deadline. Quarterly performance reports submitted on time. Consolidated SOE report contributed to.
Board meetings held quarterly as required. Board evaluation completed. Director induction programme conducted for two new directors. Conflict of interest register up to date.
ZESCO operating under expired licence pending ERB renewal. Tariff levels below cost-reflective levels as required by ERB. Technical loss reduction targets not met in FY2024.
remedialActions: Licence renewal application submitted to ERB. Tariff application filed. Technical loss reduction programme accelerated.

findings: Three safety incidents in FY2024 resulting in regulatory notices from the Zambia Railways Regulatory Authority. Track condition on 32% of mainline does not meet minimum safety standards. Safety management system documentation incomplete.
remedialActions: Safety improvement plan submitted to regulator. Track rehabilitation Phase 1 underway. Safety management system documentation being updated.

findings: NPL ratio of 11.2% exceeds BoZ threshold of 10%. Capital adequacy ratio of 14.8% above minimum 10% requirement. AML/CFT controls strengthened following BoZ examination.
remedialActions: NPL reduction plan submitted to BoZ. Enhanced credit risk management framework implemented. AML system upgrade in progress.

findings: Annual report published within statutory deadline. Continuous disclosure obligations met. AGM held within required timeframe. Insider trading policy in place and enforced.
